summary_text: {"risk":"LOW","approve":true,"findings":["Auth-stale CTA plus empty-state reason split are implemented in apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-reentry.js:17-345 and wired to real buttons/handlers in apps/happy-web/src/app.js:103-237, so stale sessions surface a primary 「再認証する」 action with context-specific copy.","The /happy/auth gateway sanitizes any returnTo, exposes Access or password flows, and persists refreshed tokens per apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-gateway.js:5-114 and apps/happy-web/auth/auth.js:71-137, which runtime tests in apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-gateway-runtime.js:95-199 cover.","Shared auth token persistence and multi-tab refresh coordination rely on apps/happy-web/src/domain/happy-auth-session.js:1-22 plus the locking/broadcast logic in apps/happy-web/src/adapters/happy-endpoint-client.js:136-325, with concurrency guarantees exercised by apps/happy-web/tests/test-endpoint-client.js:135-417.","The end-to-end auth-stale recovery smoke (CTA → gateway → synced state) in apps/happy-web/tests/test-auth-stale-reauth-smoke.js:85-247 confirms resume-state storage, safe redirection, and remote recovery without requiring new code.","Local-direct Claude kernel runner restoration stays validated by tests/test-agent-runner-provider-compat.sh:16-345, which executes fake claude binaries via the subscription harness to ensure CLI flags, noise filtering, and provider fallbacks all still work offline."],"recommendation":"Mark the local/kernel implementation complete and move on to the remaining manual Safari/PWA smoke checks the issue called out; no further code changes are needed for this scope.","rationale":"All six scope items already exist in apps/happy-web with targeted automated coverage (gateway, returnTo, token persistence, empty states, CTA wiring, and kernel runner harness). The specified test quartet exercises each path successfully, so the only outstanding work is the explicitly out-of-scope manual Safari/PWA smoke verification."}
